mapper.select:
SELECT A.id , MAX(A.api_name) , MAX(A.api_url) , MAX(A.api_method) , MAX(A.api_code) , GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT R.role_code ORDER BY R.role_code SEPARATOR ', ') AS roleCodes FROM sys_api A LEFT JOIN sys_role_api RA ON A.id= RA.api_id LEFT JOIN sys_roles R ON RA.role_id = R.id
WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(A.api_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{sysApiCondition.apiName, typeHandler=backend.common.handler.LikeEscapeTypeHandler}), '%')
AND UPPER(A.api_url) LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{sysApiCondition.apiUrl, typeHandler=backend.common.handler.LikeEscapeTypeHandler}), '%')
GROUP BY A.id
